title: Weekend plan
body: Complete priority errands early, reserve the afternoon for family time, and prepare the next week task list.

title: Reading list
body: Project leadership, decision quality, dashboard storytelling, and practical AI automation.

title: Shopping list
body: Household supplies, printer paper, charging cable, and storage labels.

title: Travel checklist
body: Identification, charger, backup battery, reservation details, medication pouch, and emergency contacts.

title: Ideas for improvement
body: Use a five-minute daily review, batch similar errands, and keep one clear weekly personal objective.

title: Courses to consider
body: Advanced Power BI modelling, Python automation, presentation design, and contract administration.
